title: Flow Cytometry Protocol for Human HER2 Detection Using Anti-HER2 Antibodies
author: abinScience cheng
materials: Do NOT wash. Proceed directly to antibody staining.

steps.title: Harvest cells
steps.instruction: Harvest cells. For adherent cells (e.g., SK-BR-3, BT-474), use Accutase to preserve surface antigens.

steps.title: Wash once with PBS, centrifuge at...
steps.instruction: Wash once with PBS, centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Resuspend in FACS buffer (PBS + 2% FBS + 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend in FACS buffer (PBS + 2% FBS + 0.05% sodium azide) at 1 × 10⁷ cells/mL.

steps.title: Aliquot 100 μL (1 × 10⁶...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 100 μL (1 × 10⁶ cells) per well into a 96-well V-bottom plate. Recommended positive control: SK-BR-3 (HER2 3+) or BT-474 (HER2 3+). Recommended negative control: MDA-MB-231 (HER2 low).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 minutes, discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 minutes, discard supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend in 100 μL PBS containing...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 100 μL PBS containing viability dye per manufacturer's instructions.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes, protected from light
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes, protected from light.

steps.title: Wash once with FACS buffer
steps.instruction: Wash once with FACS buffer.

steps.title: Resuspend cells in 50 μL FACS...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in 50 μL FACS buffer containing Fc block (5 μL per test).

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Add antibody at recommended concentration
steps.instruction: Add antibody at recommended concentration: 1–10 μg/mL for unconjugated; per manufacturer's datasheet for conjugated formats.

steps.title: Incubate at 4°C for 30 minutes, protected from light
steps.instruction: Incubate at 4°C for 30 minutes, protected from light.

steps.title: Wash twice with 200 μL FACS...
steps.instruction: Wash twice with 200 μL FACS buffer, centrifuge at 300 × g for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Resuspend in 100 μL FACS buffer...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 100 μL FACS buffer containing fluorochrome-conjugated secondary antibody at recommended dilution.

steps.title: Incubate at 4°C for 20–30 minutes, protected from light
steps.instruction: Incubate at 4°C for 20–30 minutes, protected from light.

steps.title: Wash twice with FACS buffer
steps.instruction: Wash twice with FACS buffer.

steps.title: Resuspend cells in 200 μL 2% paraformaldehyde in PBS
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in 200 μL 2% paraformaldehyde in PBS.

steps.title: Incubate at 4°C for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 4°C for 15 minutes.

steps.title: Wash once with FACS buffer
steps.instruction: Wash once with FACS buffer.

steps.title: Resuspend in 200 μL FACS buffer for acquisition
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 200 μL FACS buffer for acquisition. Fixed samples can be stored at 4°C protected from light and acquired within 24 hours.

steps.title: Acquire ≥10,000 events in the live...
steps.instruction: Acquire ≥10,000 events in the live cell gate on a flow cytometer.

steps.title: Gating strategy
steps.instruction: Gating strategy: FSC/SSC → singlets (FSC-A vs FSC-H) → viable cells → HER2+ population.

steps.title: Include isotype control or FMO control...
steps.instruction: Include isotype control or FMO control to set the positive gate.

steps.title: Expected results
steps.instruction: Expected results: SK-BR-3 should show >95% HER2-positive; MDA-MB-231 should show <5% HER2-positive.
